expected: Production /agent history must be backed by real sessions or not rendered as clickable demo history.
Production /agent mini-navigation must use real product route links, not inert demo buttons.
New production chat messages must use the real current Date at creation time.
actualBefore: Production /agent inherited HISTORY_ITEMS from the landing demo component.
Mini-navigation rendered button-only demo controls without hrefs.
Message timestamps came from a deterministic synthetic sequence.
fixApplied: Added production nav items with real hrefs and passed them into CollapsedAppNav on /agent.
Passed an empty production history list into AgentConversationList so demo HISTORY_ITEMS stay landing-only.
Replaced synthetic sequence timestamps with new Date() formatting at message creation.
Kept landing demo defaults intact through opt-in component props.
redEvidence: .\node_modules\.bin\vitest.CMD run src/workspace/agent/agent-surface.test.tsx -> 3 failures before implementation: demo history contained План недели, nav links were [], timestamp was synthetic 17:41 instead of mocked current Date 13:37.
limitations: Real OpenRouter/Anthropic proposal quality and live SSE browser traversal remain provider-blocked under BUG-SHELL-12 and RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE.
regressionRisk: Medium. Production /agent and landing demo share components; tests lock that production no longer renders fake demo chrome while component defaults keep the landing demo behavior.
